message:
test(labruntime): port 22 workflow async tests to LabRuntime (ft-22x4r)

Port all portable #[tokio::test] tests from workflows/mod.rs to asupersync
RuntimeFixture: 9 descriptor workflow tests, 1 policy gated injector test,
5 HandleCompaction tests, 3 HandleProcessTriageLifecycle tests,
1 HandleSessionEnd test, 1 persist_caut_refresh_accounts test, and
2 HandleAuthRequired tests.
